title: The Pilgrim's Progress
author: John Bunyan
tradition_notes: Bunyan was a Nonconformist minister and Particular Baptist, shaped by English Puritan theology.
source_edition: Standard Ebooks edition (CC0 editorial work, public domain text)
notes: Two-part allegorical narrative. Part 1 (1678) and Part 2 (1684) are separate top-level sections.
